title: Repurposed Book Journals
excerpt: Our collection of journals is growing. JC uses them daily for work notes, and I tend to "save" mine by only writing in them randomly. But seeing that it's a new month, and the beginning of the second half of…
body: Our collection of journals is growing. JC uses them daily for work notes, and I tend to "save" mine by only writing in them randomly. But seeing that it's a new month, and the beginning of the second half of the year, seems to be the perfect time for a mid-year resolution. I am going to take notes, add clippings and random bits in daily. It will house my to-do list. I'm not going to worry about how pretty it is or worry about sharing the pages, other than for Here & There Inspiration. These ex libris anonymous books make great anything-you-want-to-put-in-them journals. Love that the are bound with some of the pages from the actual book. These are totally original and unique, just like you!
